summary: Vertical selfie-style video of the DHS Secretary speaking to camera in a wood-trimmed office with blue-grey walls. In part of the clip an overlaid screenshot of an ICE detainee status-lookup web page is shown, with detainee fields and 'In DHS Custody' status and a 'Notify Me of Status Changes' button; the personal fields are redacted. Burned-in caption subtitles appear (for example 'IT HELPED VICTIMS'). The audio is him describing an ICE program that supports crime victims during National Crime Victims week.

script.scene: DHS Secretary speaks to camera in a blue-walled office; an overlaid ICE detainee status-lookup web page with redacted fields and 'In DHS Custody' status appears; caption 'IT HELPED VICTIMS.'
